name: reva-phd-scholar
description: REVA PhD Scholar: Stage-aware doctoral journey companion for CSE/CSA scholars. 9-stage lifecycle coaching from topic scouting to thesis submission, patent filing, and grant hunting. Supervisor /guide mode included.

copilotAgents.name: phd-scholar
copilotAgents.description: Ask PhD Scholar for stage-wise doctoral journey guidance — coursework, research, publication, thesis, patents, and grants. Use /guide for supervisor mode.

slashCommands.name: guide
slashCommands.description: Activate supervisor mode — manage your scholar roster, review milestones, and access feedback templates.
